---
title: "Shankar D"
image: "files/IMG_3748.jpg"
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:sdeenadayalan@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/shankar-d
---

This is a Quarto website for Marketing Analytics.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
